title: Faithful PBR 32x
description: PBR materials addon for Faithful 32x resourcepack
body:
![enter image description here](https://i.imgur.com/h6JAF7J.png)

## Want to get early access updates and higher resolution versions? Consider supporting me on Patreon!
[![image-text](https://i.imgur.com/ok6G2c0.png)](https://www.patreon.com/PapaChef)

This pack adds high quality PBR materials to the popular Faithful 32x resourcepack. This pack utilises LabPBR materials like normal-mapping, emission and smoothness to give the textures a realistic touch!

This pack requires a [LabPBR shaderpack](https://wiki.shaderlabs.org/wiki/LabPBR_Supported_Packs) and works best with Optifine.

<iframe width="455" height="809" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/wd9nxVXcr7w" title="#shorts This resourcepack is insane! 🔥 Faithful PBR 2048x Realism resourcepack" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
